title: DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: BEAVERTON CITY LIBRARY DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in day space to go inside out of the cold to warm up temporarily throughout the winter season. Additional services may be offered. 12375 SW 5th Street Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Wednesday 10am-7pm, Thursday-Saturday 10am-6pm, Sunday 1pm-6pm Email (503) 644-2197 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 644-2197 Main phone Main phone (503) 644-2197 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call ahead to confirm hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 52, 54, 57, MAX Blue line, and WES Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
